headline: CMS Leverages Grid Upgrades & Renewable Expansion to Drive Growth
summary: CMS Energy is investing heavily in grid upgrades, renewables and battery storage, but coal ash disposal costs remain a key risk to watch.

raw.headline: CMS Leverages Grid Upgrades & Renewable Expansion to Drive Growth

headline: CMS Energy: An Undervalued Energy Holding Company For Long-Term Dividend Growth Investors
summary: CMS has increased its dividend for 20 consecutive years. Its 10-year dividend growth rate of 6.5% is very solid for a power utility. See why I rate CMS a buy.

headline: BMO Capital Reaffirms Outperform Rating for CMS Energy (CMS)
summary: CMS Energy Corp. (NYSE:CMS) is one of the 11 best regulated electric stocks to buy now. On June 4, BMO Capital analyst James Thalacker maintained an Outperform rating on CMS Energy Corp. (NYSE:CMS) and reduced the price target from $82 to $81. This revision follows a fresh regulatory filing by the company’s subsidiary, Consumers Energy, […]
